TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tapang Č = Gaga mniq Cyaiseyn Arisansyang ka alang Tapang Č. 227 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 642 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 565 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 77 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Cou 83%, Amis 1%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, Saysiyat 1%,ni rahuq na o 1%. = Tnhangan : alang Tapang = Thyang alang Klwaan nniqan A-ri-san syan ka alang Tapang, dha kska paru bi alang ni egu bi nniqan sjiqan Cow. ‚ÄĽPndaan naqih sbgihur Mo-ra-ke nii ngalan naqi nniqan kdusan alang : Tqiyan emptgsa, qpahun klwaan alang(sluun knburah : Hunac sapah pyasan ciway, kingal isil ddriq latuc, rima latuc isil hraan hidaw)(hngkawas 98 ngalan utux bgihur rsux Mo-ra-ke sluun knburah ni syukun puuda kkmalu ddaan pptasan). Nniqan alang : Cya-i-seyn A ‚Äďri san syang Ta-pang-cun. Klbangan : Kndkilan lnglingay : Bowqax dgiyaq, hngligan 800~1,000 km Kklaan ppanan : ‚óéMgriq rulu: Jiyax tuki gmriq rulu. Kndadax kwo-taw tgtru kaw-su-kong-lu stabuy truma elug Con g-pu, kleelug seng-taw tgmaxal maspac pnglxan"A-ri-san" yaa bi mksa kingal tuki pdhuq S-cwo da, paah S-cwo mquri narac pgriq do kmdudul musa kika pdhuq alang Ta-pang da. Paah cung-san-kaw Cya-yi cyaw-ryow-taw niqan pnlxan ka kleelug mquri seusa Tay18 haw seng-taw, kleelug pnglxan"A-ri-san"musa do yaa bi kingal tiki do dhuq S-cwo, paah S-cwo mquri narac pgriq do kmdudul musa kika pdhuq alang Ta-pang da. Mlutuc teyn-c pneyusan Teyn-c pneyusan alang. Tnealang seejiq Cuo. Skari : Kari Cuo, kari Tlu, kari Klmukan. Snhiyan cung-cyaw : Snhiyan kleegan seejiq sbiyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw. Mniyah alang Niqan ka snalu kari o, Utux baraw seejiq Cuw-cu Hamo, Psaw seejiq, ramang dowriq, mlukus qraqil kumay uxay uri o embanah lkusan, dhuq kxil ka knbragan na. mtuci Yu-san ka Utux baraw, sllbi ka dara qhuni, psalu rdrudan sbiyaw Cow, knhuway mrana pniqan knklgan mlutuc seejiq ni alang. Bukuy do, miyah ka paru qsiya, wada saw gsilung paru dxgal, wada tbbiyax qduriq dhuq Yu-san ka sjiqun. Mlih ka paru qsiya da, Utux baraw o niqan dha qnqahan dapi ka ruwan ddgiya, kiya ka nniqan sjiqun, kika alang Ta-pan o tg2 nniqan dapil Utux baraw Hamo, kghak nniq Ri-cya, San-mey, sing-mey, ca-san, le-yey ni Lay-ci Syaw-se dnii. Ta-pan o cng-c ni wen-hwa cong-sing A-ri-san Cuw-cu. Tgkingal dhuq tgempitu ssiyaw alang Ta-pan sayan ka alang Ta-pan. Ida nniq hunac hraan hidaw ka sejiqun Te-fu-yey, yasa tnsamac siida nadas dha ka huling lmiqu nniq Ta-pan ta-se tnwawa kingal ciway huling, ana wada dsan ka huling, ida miyah mkksa Ta-pan ka huling lmiqu, kika prajil niqan seejiq miyah thjil nniqan Ta-pan, kiya ka kiya ni wada phiyug kingal syaw-se ka Ta-pan da. Ddhuq bukuy do gaga miyah mtuma spac lutuc dara seejiq, bukuy na duri o mangal kingal putuh ruuc mqri qhuni ni qihur phiyug kingal saan mseupu prhulan, kiya ni slutuc dhuq sayang. Rrigaw kklaan Pusu tatac pnglxan: Seejiq Cuw-cu c-yueyn-cung-sin I-s-ci-an-na(Iskiana)kndkilan ddupan Kndkilan kantin (langu utux) Tnglaq Hakaw utux, tnglaq ta-te-an Bling klaway, btunux hay-rwo Saan mseupu prhulan snaw- "qu-pa"
S.PHON: = tapaŇč* = gaga mniq ¶jais…ôn a…ĺisansjaŇč ka alaŇč tapaŇč*. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, ¶ou **%, amis *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, sajsijat *%,ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. = tnńßaŇčan : alaŇč tapaŇč = tńßjaŇč alaŇč klwaan nniqan a-…ĺi-san sjan ka alaŇč tapaŇč, dńßa kska pa…ĺu bi alaŇč ni …ôgu bi nniqan s…üiqan ¶ow. *pndaan naqińß sbgińßu…ĺ mo-…ĺa-k…ô nii Ňčalan naqi nniqan kdusan alaŇč : tqijan …ômptgsa, qpańßun klwaan alaŇč(sluun knbu…ĺańß : ńßuna ¶ sapańß pjasan ¶iwaj, kiŇčal isil dd…ĺiq latu ¶, …ĺima latu ¶ isil ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw)(ńßŇčkawas ** Ňčalan utux bgińßu…ĺ …ĺsux mo-…ĺa-k…ô sluun knbu…ĺańß ni sjukun puuda kkmalu ddaan pptasan). nniqan alaŇč : ¶ja-i-s…ôn a *…ĺi san sjaŇč ta-paŇč- ¶un. klbaŇčan : kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj : bowqax dgijaq, ńßŇčligan ***~*,*** km kklaan ppanan : *mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: …üijax tuki gm…ĺiq …ĺulu. kndadax kwo-taw tgt…ĺu kaw-su-koŇč-lu stabuj t…ĺuma …ôlug ¶on g-pu, kl…ô…ôlug s…ôŇč-taw tgmaxal maspa ¶ pŇčlxan"a-…ĺi-san" jaa bi mksa kiŇčal tuki pdńßuq s- ¶wo da, paańß s- ¶wo mqu…ĺi na…ĺa ¶ pg…ĺiq do kmdudul musa kika pdńßuq alaŇč ta-paŇč da. paańß ¶uŇč-san-kaw ¶ja-ji ¶jaw-…ĺjow-taw niqan pnlxan ka kl…ô…ôlug mqu…ĺi s…ôusa taj** ńßaw s…ôŇč-taw, kl…ô…ôlug pŇčlxan"a-…ĺi-san"musa do jaa bi kiŇčal tiki do dńßuq s- ¶wo, paańß s- ¶wo mqu…ĺi na…ĺa ¶ pg…ĺiq do kmdudul musa kika pdńßuq alaŇč ta-paŇč da. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan alaŇč. tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uo. ska…ĺi : ka…ĺi ¶uo, ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi klmukan. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw : snńßijan kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw, ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. mnijańß alaŇč niqan ka snalu ka…ĺi o, utux ba…ĺaw s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uw- ¶u ńßamo, psaw s…ô…ô…üiq, …ĺamaŇč dow…ĺiq, mlukus q…ĺaqil kumaj uxaj u…ĺi o …ômbanańß lkusan, dńßuq kxil ka knb…ĺagan na. mtu ¶i ju-san ka utux ba…ĺaw, sllbi ka da…ĺa qńßuni, psalu …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw ¶ow, knńßuwaj m…ĺana pniqan knklgan mlutu ¶ s…ô…ô…üiq ni alaŇč. bukuj do, mijańß ka pa…ĺu qsija, wada saw gsiluŇč pa…ĺu dxgal, wada tbbijax qdu…ĺiq dńßuq ju-san ka s…üiqun. mlińß ka pa…ĺu qsija da, utux ba…ĺaw o niqan dńßa qnqańßan dapi ka …ĺuwan ddgija, kija ka nniqan s…üiqun, kika alaŇč ta-pan o tg* nniqan dapil utux ba…ĺaw ńßamo, kgńßak nniq …ĺi- ¶ja, san-m…ô, siŇč-m…ô, ¶a-san, l…ô-j…ô ni laj- ¶i sjaw-s…ô dnii. ta-pan o ¶Ňč- ¶ ni w…ôn-ńßwa ¶oŇč-siŇč a-…ĺi-san ¶uw- ¶u. tgkiŇčal dńßuq tg…ômpitu ssijaw alaŇč ta-pan sajan ka alaŇč ta-pan. ida nniq ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ka s…ô…üiqun t…ô-*u-j…ô, jasa tnsama ¶ siida nadas dńßa ka ńßuliŇč lmiqu nniq ta-pan ta-s…ô tnwawa kiŇčal ¶iwaj ńßuliŇč, ana wada dsan ka ńßuliŇč, ida mijańß mkksa ta-pan ka ńßuliŇč lmiqu, kika p…ĺa…üil niqan s…ô…ô…üiq mijańß tńß…üil nniqan ta-pan, kija ka kija ni wada pńßijug kiŇčal sjaw-s…ô ka ta-pan da. ddńßuq bukuj do gaga mijańß mtuma spa ¶ lutu ¶ da…ĺa s…ô…ô…üiq, bukuj na du…ĺi o maŇčal kiŇčal putuńß …ĺuu ¶ mq…ĺi qńßuni ni qińßu…ĺ pńßijug kiŇčal saan ms…ôupu p…ĺńßulan, kija ni slutu ¶ dńßuq sajaŇč. …ĺ…ĺigaw kklaan pusu tata ¶ pŇčlxan: s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uw- ¶u ¶-ju…ôn- ¶uŇč-sin i-s- ¶i-an-na(iskiana)kndkilan ddupan kndkilan kantin (laŇču utux) tŇčlaq ńßakaw utux, tŇčlaq ta-t…ô-an bliŇč klawaj, btunux ńßaj-…ĺwo saan ms…ôupu p…ĺńßulan snaw- "qu-pa"
S.FORM: = Tapang Č = Gaga mniq Cyaiseyn Arisansyang ka alang Tapang Č. 227 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 642 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 565 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 77 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Cou 83%, Amis 1%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, Saysiyat 1%,ni rahuq na o 1%. = Tnhangan : alang Tapang = Thyang alang Klwaan nniqan A-ri-san syan ka alang Tapang, dha kska paru bi alang ni egu bi nniqan sjiqan Cow. ‚ÄĽPndaan naqih sbgihur Mo-ra-ke nii ngalan naqi nniqan kdusan alang : Tqiyan emptgsa, qpahun klwaan alang(sluun knburah : Hunac sapah pyasan ciway, kingal isil ddriq latuc, rima latuc isil hraan hidaw)(hngkawas 98 ngalan utux bgihur rsux Mo-ra-ke sluun knburah ni syukun puuda kkmalu ddaan pptasan). Nniqan alang : Cya-i-seyn A ‚Äďri san syang Ta-pang-cun. Klbangan : Kndkilan lnglingay : Bowqax dgiyaq, hngligan 800~1,000 km Kklaan ppanan : ‚óéMgriq rulu: Jiyax tuki gmriq rulu. Kndadax kwo-taw tgtru kaw-su-kong-lu stabuy truma elug Con g-pu, kleelug seng-taw tgmaxal maspac pnglxan"A-ri-san" yaa bi mksa kingal tuki pdhuq S-cwo da, paah S-cwo mquri narac pgriq do kmdudul musa kika pdhuq alang Ta-pang da. Paah cung-san-kaw Cya-yi cyaw-ryow-taw niqan pnlxan ka kleelug mquri seusa Tay18 haw seng-taw, kleelug pnglxan"A-ri-san"musa do yaa bi kingal tiki do dhuq S-cwo, paah S-cwo mquri narac pgriq do kmdudul musa kika pdhuq alang Ta-pang da. Mlutuc teyn-c pneyusan Teyn-c pneyusan alang. Tnealang seejiq Cuo. Skari : Kari Cuo, kari Tlu, kari Klmukan. Snhiyan cung-cyaw : Snhiyan kleegan seejiq sbiyaw, Ci-tu-cyaw. Mniyah alang Niqan ka snalu kari o, Utux baraw seejiq Cuw-cu Hamo, Psaw seejiq, ramang dowriq, mlukus qraqil kumay uxay uri o embanah lkusan, dhuq kxil ka knbragan na. mtuci Yu-san ka Utux baraw, sllbi ka dara qhuni, psalu rdrudan sbiyaw Cow, knhuway mrana pniqan knklgan mlutuc seejiq ni alang. Bukuy do, miyah ka paru qsiya, wada saw gsilung paru dxgal, wada tbbiyax qduriq dhuq Yu-san ka sjiqun. Mlih ka paru qsiya da, Utux baraw o niqan dha qnqahan dapi ka ruwan ddgiya, kiya ka nniqan sjiqun, kika alang Ta-pan o tg2 nniqan dapil Utux baraw Hamo, kghak nniq Ri-cya, San-mey, sing-mey, ca-san, le-yey ni Lay-ci Syaw-se dnii. Ta-pan o cng-c ni wen-hwa cong-sing A-ri-san Cuw-cu. Tgkingal dhuq tgempitu ssiyaw alang Ta-pan sayan ka alang Ta-pan. Ida nniq hunac hraan hidaw ka sejiqun Te-fu-yey, yasa tnsamac siida nadas dha ka huling lmiqu nniq Ta-pan ta-se tnwawa kingal ciway huling, ana wada dsan ka huling, ida miyah mkksa Ta-pan ka huling lmiqu, kika prajil niqan seejiq miyah thjil nniqan Ta-pan, kiya ka kiya ni wada phiyug kingal syaw-se ka Ta-pan da. Ddhuq bukuy do gaga miyah mtuma spac lutuc dara seejiq, bukuy na duri o mangal kingal putuh ruuc mqri qhuni ni qihur phiyug kingal saan mseupu prhulan, kiya ni slutuc dhuq sayang. Rrigaw kklaan Pusu tatac pnglxan: Seejiq Cuw-cu c-yueyn-cung-sin I-s-ci-an-na(Iskiana)kndkilan ddupan Kndkilan kantin (langu utux) Tnglaq Hakaw utux, tnglaq ta-te-an Bling klaway, btunux hay-rwo Saan mseupu prhulan snaw- "qu-pa"
S.PHON: = tapaŇč* = gaga mniq ¶jais…ôn a…ĺisansjaŇč ka alaŇč tapaŇč*. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, ¶ou **%, amis *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, sajsijat *%,ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. = tnńßaŇčan : alaŇč tapaŇč = tńßjaŇč alaŇč klwaan nniqan a-…ĺi-san sjan ka alaŇč tapaŇč, dńßa kska pa…ĺu bi alaŇč ni …ôgu bi nniqan s…üiqan ¶ow. *pndaan naqińß sbgińßu…ĺ mo-…ĺa-k…ô nii Ňčalan naqi nniqan kdusan alaŇč : tqijan …ômptgsa, qpańßun klwaan alaŇč(sluun knbu…ĺańß : ńßuna ¶ sapańß pjasan ¶iwaj, kiŇčal isil dd…ĺiq latu ¶, …ĺima latu ¶ isil ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw)(ńßŇčkawas ** Ňčalan utux bgińßu…ĺ …ĺsux mo-…ĺa-k…ô sluun knbu…ĺańß ni sjukun puuda kkmalu ddaan pptasan). nniqan alaŇč : ¶ja-i-s…ôn a *…ĺi san sjaŇč ta-paŇč- ¶un. klbaŇčan : kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj : bowqax dgijaq, ńßŇčligan ***~*,*** km kklaan ppanan : *mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: …üijax tuki gm…ĺiq …ĺulu. kndadax kwo-taw tgt…ĺu kaw-su-koŇč-lu stabuj t…ĺuma …ôlug ¶on g-pu, kl…ô…ôlug s…ôŇč-taw tgmaxal maspa ¶ pŇčlxan"a-…ĺi-san" jaa bi mksa kiŇčal tuki pdńßuq s- ¶wo da, paańß s- ¶wo mqu…ĺi na…ĺa ¶ pg…ĺiq do kmdudul musa kika pdńßuq alaŇč ta-paŇč da. paańß ¶uŇč-san-kaw ¶ja-ji ¶jaw-…ĺjow-taw niqan pnlxan ka kl…ô…ôlug mqu…ĺi s…ôusa taj** ńßaw s…ôŇč-taw, kl…ô…ôlug pŇčlxan"a-…ĺi-san"musa do jaa bi kiŇčal tiki do dńßuq s- ¶wo, paańß s- ¶wo mqu…ĺi na…ĺa ¶ pg…ĺiq do kmdudul musa kika pdńßuq alaŇč ta-paŇč da. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan alaŇč. tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uo. ska…ĺi : ka…ĺi ¶uo, ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi klmukan. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw : snńßijan kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw, ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. mnijańß alaŇč niqan ka snalu ka…ĺi o, utux ba…ĺaw s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uw- ¶u ńßamo, psaw s…ô…ô…üiq, …ĺamaŇč dow…ĺiq, mlukus q…ĺaqil kumaj uxaj u…ĺi o …ômbanańß lkusan, dńßuq kxil ka knb…ĺagan na. mtu ¶i ju-san ka utux ba…ĺaw, sllbi ka da…ĺa qńßuni, psalu …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw ¶ow, knńßuwaj m…ĺana pniqan knklgan mlutu ¶ s…ô…ô…üiq ni alaŇč. bukuj do, mijańß ka pa…ĺu qsija, wada saw gsiluŇč pa…ĺu dxgal, wada tbbijax qdu…ĺiq dńßuq ju-san ka s…üiqun. mlińß ka pa…ĺu qsija da, utux ba…ĺaw o niqan dńßa qnqańßan dapi ka …ĺuwan ddgija, kija ka nniqan s…üiqun, kika alaŇč ta-pan o tg* nniqan dapil utux ba…ĺaw ńßamo, kgńßak nniq …ĺi- ¶ja, san-m…ô, siŇč-m…ô, ¶a-san, l…ô-j…ô ni laj- ¶i sjaw-s…ô dnii. ta-pan o ¶Ňč- ¶ ni w…ôn-ńßwa ¶oŇč-siŇč a-…ĺi-san ¶uw- ¶u. tgkiŇčal dńßuq tg…ômpitu ssijaw alaŇč ta-pan sajan ka alaŇč ta-pan. ida nniq ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ka s…ô…üiqun t…ô-*u-j…ô, jasa tnsama ¶ siida nadas dńßa ka ńßuliŇč lmiqu nniq ta-pan ta-s…ô tnwawa kiŇčal ¶iwaj ńßuliŇč, ana wada dsan ka ńßuliŇč, ida mijańß mkksa ta-pan ka ńßuliŇč lmiqu, kika p…ĺa…üil niqan s…ô…ô…üiq mijańß tńß…üil nniqan ta-pan, kija ka kija ni wada pńßijug kiŇčal sjaw-s…ô ka ta-pan da. ddńßuq bukuj do gaga mijańß mtuma spa ¶ lutu ¶ da…ĺa s…ô…ô…üiq, bukuj na du…ĺi o maŇčal kiŇčal putuńß …ĺuu ¶ mq…ĺi qńßuni ni qińßu…ĺ pńßijug kiŇčal saan ms…ôupu p…ĺńßulan, kija ni slutu ¶ dńßuq sajaŇč. …ĺ…ĺigaw kklaan pusu tata ¶ pŇčlxan: s…ô…ô…üiq ¶uw- ¶u ¶-ju…ôn- ¶uŇč-sin i-s- ¶i-an-na(iskiana)kndkilan ddupan kndkilan kantin (laŇču utux) tŇčlaq ńßakaw utux, tŇčlaq ta-t…ô-an bliŇč klawaj, btunux ńßaj-…ĺwo saan ms…ôupu p…ĺńßulan snaw- "qu-pa"
